title: Nucleon to $Δ$ axial and pseudoscalar transition form factors
author_string: Chen Chen, Christian S. Fischer, Craig D. Roberts
abstract: A symmetry-preserving continuum approach to the calculation of baryon properties in relativistic quantum field theory is used to predict all form factors associated with nucleon-to-$Δ$ axial and pseudoscalar transition currents, thereby unifying them with many additional properties of these and other baryons. The new parameter-free predictions can serve as credible benchmarks for use in analysing existing and anticipated data from worldwide efforts focused on elucidation of $ν$ properties.
